title: Madurai, Tamil Nadu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Madurai, Tamil Nadu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Madurai is a city in Tamil Nadu with a population of 1,500,000. One of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world, known for the magnificent Meenakshi Amman Temple and Tamil culture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
